name: Zendesk
human_notes: Basic Auth deprecated in v2 but OAuth2 confirmed working. Trial at zendesk.com/register.

name: Copper
human_notes: OAuth2 not found in current public docs. API key only in Settings > API Keys. 14-day trial available.

name: Freshdesk
human_notes: Free forever plan confirmed (up to 10 agents). No trial needed.

name: Front
human_notes: Both confirmed. API token in Settings > Developers. 7-day trial.

name: Pylon
human_notes: Paid plan required. No free tier. Demo required to onboard.

name: LiveAgent
human_notes: API key confirmed in developer docs. 14-day free trial available.

name: Plain
human_notes: Free tier confirmed for small teams. GraphQL API only. API key in workspace settings.

name: Gladly
human_notes: Enterprise only. Must contact sales. No self-serve signup. OAuth2 not found in docs. Not buildable without partnership agreement.

name: Lark (Larksuite)
human_notes: Both confirmed. Free developer account at open.larksuite.com. App creation instant.

name: Telegram
human_notes: Auth is Bot Token via @BotFather not API key. Instant creation. Fully free.

name: WhatsApp Business
human_notes: System User Token via Meta Business Suite. Free tier 1000 conversations/month. Self-serve with Meta developer account.

name: Vonage
human_notes: API key + secret and JWT both confirmed. Free trial with €2 credit on signup.

name: SE Ranking
human_notes: API key confirmed. 14-day trial available. API access included in trial.

name: Apify
human_notes: API token at console.apify.com. Free tier with $5/month compute. Instant signup.

name: Sherlock
human_notes: CLI tool only. No REST API. Cannot be called as agent tool without subprocess wrapper.

name: Vercel
human_notes: Bearer token confirmed. Free hobby tier. Token in Account Settings > Tokens instantly.

name: Cloudflare
human_notes: Both confirmed. API Token recommended. Free tier available. Instant dashboard access.

name: MongoDB Atlas
human_notes: Public + Private key pair (Digest Auth) confirmed. Free M0 cluster. Keys in Access Manager.

name: Harvest
human_notes: Both OAuth2 and PAT confirmed. Free plan (1 seat 2 projects). PAT at id.getharvest.com instantly.

name: PitchBook
human_notes: Enterprise subscription only. Must contact sales. Agent final pass incorrectly marked buildable=True. Corrected to False.

name: Reducto
human_notes: Free trial credits on signup. No credit card required. Instant API key at app.reducto.ai.

name: Devin
human_notes: API key confirmed at docs.devin.ai. Paid plan required ($500+/month). MCP server available. Buildable with paid account.
